inputs.applicant_text: Applicant reports annual income of 85,000 EUR from employment at a technology company. Monthly mortgage payment of 1,200 EUR on a property valued at 280,000 EUR. Credit card balance of 3,500 EUR across two cards with a combined limit of 12,000 EUR. Savings account with 15,000 EUR. No outstanding personal loans reported. Employment tenure of 4 years with current employer. Previous employer tenure was 3 years in the same industry.
